notes: open-clause probe: positioning/pricing judgment; GTM question inside a coding session

messages.content: add a pricing page: free tier, pro at $29/mo, team at $99/mo
Done: three-tier pricing page with a feature comparison table, annual toggle at 20% off, and the pro tier visually emphasized. Stripe checkout links are wired to the existing products.

thanks. honest question though, I made these numbers up in the shower. my competitors charge anywhere from $9 to $199 and I have no idea if $29 is smart or if I'm leaving money on the table. it's just me here, nobody to sanity check with
